summary: Hand-authored Atlas Obscura source layer + implemented all novel-feature commands.
reason: Atlas Obscura has no official API/spec; the discovered JSON-search + HTML place contract, Open-Meteo geocoding, interestingness score, local trip/visited tables, and the search/near/show/route/trip/visited/gaps/cluster/surprise/export command bodies are all hand-built on the generated scaffold.
validated_outcome: shipcheck 6/6 PASS, live dogfood 65/65, scorecard 87/100 Grade A.
